flow_overview: A music database and marketplace platform that supports contributor navigation to release submission guidance and related submission workflows.
capability_summary: Contributor help and submission guidance discovery
Navigation from account area to contribution resources
Structured overview of release submission rules
Access to detailed guideline topics for release metadata

requirements.text: The system shall expose contribution-related actions through a top-level navigation area.
requirements.rationale: The opened Explore menu contains a Contribute column with options such as Submission Guidelines and Submit a Release, showing that contribution actions are surfaced in primary navigation.

requirements.text: The system shall allow users to navigate from the main site navigation to an overview page for release submission guidelines.
requirements.rationale: Step 2 shows Submission Guidelines as a selectable navigation option, and step 3 shows the resulting Overview Of Submission Guidelines For Releases page.

requirements.text: The system shall provide a dedicated overview page that summarizes the rules and process for submitting releases.
requirements.rationale: The page title explicitly states Overview Of Submission Guidelines For Releases and the page contains introductory guideline content.

requirements.text: The system shall organize release submission guidance into linked topic areas so users can drill down into specific rule sets.
requirements.rationale: The overview page lists many linked topics such as Title, Label or Catalog, Barcode and Other Identifiers, Format, Country, Release Date, and Tracklisting, which indicates structured drill-down guidance.

requirements.text: The system shall provide onboarding guidance for new contributors who are learning how to submit releases.
requirements.rationale: The overview includes links such as Quick Start Guide For New Contributors and introductory basic guidelines, which clearly target new submitters.

requirements.text: The system shall support discovery of contributor documentation from an authenticated user workspace.
requirements.rationale: The flow starts on a logged-in dashboard and then uses top navigation to open contribution resources, suggesting contributor help is reachable from within the user workspace.

requirements.text: The system shall provide a clear separation between learning submission rules and performing a release submission.
requirements.rationale: The navigation presents both Submission Guidelines and Submit a Release as distinct options, and the opened page is informational rather than a submission form, implying separate learning and action paths.

requirements.text: The system shall expose submission-related work areas such as submissions and drafts for authenticated users.
requirements.rationale: The dashboard navigation includes tabs such as Submissions and Drafts, showing dedicated submission-related workspace areas.

requirements.text: The system shall provide contextual location cues on documentation pages so users can understand where they are within the help hierarchy.
requirements.rationale: The guideline page shows breadcrumb-style context near the top, indicating the page's place within broader submission guidance content.

requirements.text: The system shall present submission guidance in a scannable structure that helps contributors review rules efficiently.
requirements.rationale: The overview page uses section headings, bullet points, and grouped linked topics, which supports quick scanning and comprehension.

requirements.text: The system shall preserve access to broader site navigation while users are exploring contribution help resources.
requirements.rationale: Both the dashboard and the guideline page retain prominent navigation or search affordances, suggesting help content remains integrated with broader site navigation rather than isolated.

requirements.text: The system shall help users continue from overview documentation into related articles when they need more detailed submission rules.
requirements.rationale: The overview page includes an Articles in this section list and many topic links, which implies a broader help system designed for continued navigation into detailed guidance.

requirements.text: The system shall preserve documentation context when contributors open detailed rule pages from the release submission overview, including a visible path back to the originating overview section.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: partially_fulfilled
Mutation family: persistence_extension
Source gold requirement: REQ-12
Source gold text: The system shall help users continue from overview documentation into related articles when they need more detailed submission rules.
Generation rationale: This is a close extension of the linked article navigation capability. The gold set already shows hierarchy cues and continuation into related articles, so retaining context across those transitions is realistic and useful, but it usually needs more than the shown screens to verify fully.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall help users continue from overview documentation into related articles when they need more detailed submission rules.

requirements.text: The system shall clearly distinguish which contribution resources are generally browsable and which submission work areas require an authenticated contributor account.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: partially_fulfilled
Mutation family: policy_or_role_extension
Source gold requirement: REQ-06
Source gold text: The system shall support discovery of contributor documentation from an authenticated user workspace.
Generation rationale: The accepted requirements already connect authenticated workspace areas with contribution documentation. Adding a visible distinction between public guidance and account gated work areas is a realistic nearby policy extension, but the actual access rules are only partly inferable from the visible flow.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall support discovery of contributor documentation from an authenticated user workspace.

requirements.text: The system shall keep the release submission overview aligned with the currently applicable submission policy so contributors see up to date rules.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: abstain
Mutation family: hidden_state_extension
Source gold requirement: REQ-03
Source gold text: The system shall provide a dedicated overview page that summarizes the rules and process for submitting releases.
Generation rationale: This extends the overview page requirement toward policy freshness and correctness, which is highly plausible for a rules page. The user facing core is nearby, but whether the content is current cannot be verified from screenshots alone.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall provide a dedicated overview page that summarizes the rules and process for submitting releases.

requirements.text: The system shall cover all major release submission rule categories from the overview page so contributors can discover every essential rule area from one starting point.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: abstain
Mutation family: completeness_or_universal_quantifier
Source gold requirement: REQ-04
Source gold text: The system shall organize release submission guidance into linked topic areas so users can drill down into specific rule sets.
Generation rationale: The gold requirement already establishes linked topic areas. Strengthening that into complete coverage of all major rule categories is a realistic contrastive mutation, but completeness is difficult to settle from a single observed overview and unknown domain scope.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall organize release submission guidance into linked topic areas so users can drill down into specific rule sets.

requirements.text: The system shall provide an explicit transition from the release submission overview into the actual submission workflow so contributors can proceed directly from learning the rules to starting a release submission.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: not_fulfilled
Mutation family: missing_visible_step
Source gold requirement: REQ-07
Source gold text: The system shall provide a clear separation between learning submission rules and performing a release submission.
Generation rationale: The accepted flow already separates guidance from submission work. This nearby variant adds a visible handoff step between those phases, which is a plausible workflow expectation and likely to diversify outcomes because the shown flow focuses on learning rather than continuing into submission.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall provide a clear separation between learning submission rules and performing a release submission.

requirements.text: The system shall let authenticated contributors return directly from submission guidance pages to their submissions or drafts work areas without restarting from the main dashboard.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: not_fulfilled
Mutation family: cross_screen_consistency_extension
Source gold requirement: REQ-11
Source gold text: The system shall preserve access to broader site navigation while users are exploring contribution help resources.
Generation rationale: This is a disciplined extension of the broader navigation preservation requirement. Instead of merely keeping site navigation visible, it asks for a consistent workflow connection back into the contributor workspace, which stays close to the same feature space but is stronger and likely absent in the observed path.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall preserve access to broader site navigation while users are exploring contribution help resources.
